commands.test_full: cargo test --workspace (requires network for goose git dep + dbus for keyring)
commands.notes: Full workspace build requires: libxcb1-dev, libdbus-1-dev, pkg-config, network access for goose git dep. Only opengoose-types, opengoose-profiles, opengoose-persistence can be tested in sandboxed env.

testing_notes.note: Offline test landscape is saturated. All meaningful gaps in offline-testable crates have been addressed. Remaining opportunities (SessionManager, team executors) blocked by network/dbus deps in sandbox.

completed_work.description: Task 5: Commented on issue #51 (Duplicate Error Enums) noting test duplication angle and refactoring guidance.

Added 2 tests directly to main: StreamStarted/Updated/Completed Display (opengoose-types: 59→60) + empty GOOSE_RECIPE_PATH guard (opengoose-profiles: 52→53). No PR was created - tests landed directly on main.
Added 4 tests: YamlFileStore::list() extension filtering (3 tests) + WorkItemStore::set_input() (1 test)

testing_backlog.item: opengoose-core SessionManager - needs DB and EventBus, complex cache-DB consistency logic, no tests. Blocked by goose network dep.
testing_backlog.notes: Cannot test in sandbox - needs network for goose dep

testing_backlog.item: opengoose-teams chain/router/fan_out executors - complex orchestration logic, existing tests only cover basics.
testing_backlog.notes: Cannot test in sandbox - needs network for goose dep

testing_backlog.item: opengoose-secrets keyring_backend MockStore patterns could be extended
Error enum test consolidation (profiles + teams error.rs) - if issue #51 is acted on, tests should be co-located with the shared type
testing_backlog.notes: Dependent on maintainer acting on issue #51
